economic_hypothesis: An abnormal compression or dispersion of ES trade inter-arrival times reveals an execution-urgency regime that signed volume, clip size and event-bar completion alone do not identify; liquidity suppliers or late followers pay when that renewal regime persists, releases from silence, or exhausts.
who_pays: Liquidity suppliers who update too slowly after a clustered arrival shock, late aggressive followers who extrapolate a burst after arrivals decay, and traders who mistake distributed parent-order slicing for noise.
persistence_rationale: The class measures the renewal distribution of exchange-event timestamps inside completed minutes. It does not use mini/micro latency, fixed-quantity event completion, aggressor-sign runs, clip-size composition, half-minute signed-flow allocation, delayed price-impact ratios, or basket recombination.

source.raw_record_order: exchange event timestamp then stable source order after filtering one explicit ES contract

feature_policy.minute_partition: twelve fixed five-second bins by exchange-event timestamp inside each completed minute
feature_policy.interarrival_gap: nonnegative difference between consecutive exchange-event timestamps inside the same completed minute
feature_policy.positive_gap_median_ns: median of strictly positive interarrival gaps; minutes with fewer than two positive gaps are ineligible
feature_policy.arrival_entropy: Shannon entropy of twelve five-second trade-count shares divided by log(12)
feature_policy.maximum_five_second_share: maximum trade-count bin divided by completed-minute trade count
feature_policy.trade_count: number of ES trade records in the completed minute
feature_policy.signed_flow_fraction: buy aggressor size minus sell aggressor size divided by total trade size
feature_policy.price_progress: last trade price minus first trade price in the completed minute

past_only_state_policy.clustered_arrival: positive_gap_median_ns below its past 20th percentile AND arrival_entropy below its past 20th percentile AND maximum_five_second_share above its past 80th percentile
past_only_state_policy.distributed_arrival: arrival_entropy above its past 80th percentile AND maximum_five_second_share below its past 20th percentile
past_only_state_policy.directional_flow: absolute signed_flow_fraction above its past median and nonzero
past_only_state_policy.two_sided_flow: absolute signed_flow_fraction below its past 20th percentile

motifs.definition: clustered_arrival AND high_activity AND directional_flow AND flow_direction equals price_direction; direction is flow_direction
clustered_arrival AND high_activity AND directional_flow AND price_direction differs from flow_direction, including zero price progress; direction is opposite flow_direction
distributed_arrival AND high_activity AND directional_flow AND flow_direction equals price_direction; direction is flow_direction

prior completed minute is low_activity and has positive_gap_median_ns above its past 80th percentile; current minute is clustered_arrival, high_activity and directional_flow with matching nonzero price_direction; direction is current flow_direction

prior completed minute is clustered_arrival, high_activity and directional_flow; current minute is low_activity with positive_gap_median_ns above its past 80th percentile; direction is opposite prior flow_direction
clustered_arrival AND high_activity AND two_sided_flow AND nonzero price_direction; direction is opposite price_direction

signal_policy.decision_timestamp: availability of the completed source minute
signal_policy.entry: first explicit-contract one-minute open at or after decision timestamp
signal_policy.exit: explicit-contract one-minute open exactly frozen holding_minutes after entry

cemetery_firewall.novelty_basis: within-minute interarrival renewal distribution and its past-only transition, independent of print size and sign topology

CONTRE: Trade-arrival clustering may reduce to the familiar intraday activity curve or generic volatility, and two one-month calendar blocks may not provide enough independent renewal regimes; the unchanged tripwire, walk-forward, SIM_EXPLOIT and candidate-specific power gates remain mandatory.
